title: cucurbita pepo var. sororia
intro: Cucurbita pepo var. sororia, also known as the 'Lincoln Pumpkin', is a type of vining plant belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family, characterized by its yellow and green striped rind and edible seeds. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cucurbita pepo var. sororia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried seeds, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health applications.
